title: Inside NASA’s daring race to save a doomed space telescope - USA Today
summary_full: Inside NASA’s daring race to save a doomed space telescope  USA TodayPartners, NASA Ready for June Launch of Swift Boost Mission  NASA Science (.gov)NASA is paying $30 million for a 1st-of-its-kind rescue mission to the aging Swift telescope before it falls from space.
